title: VINaudit Vehicle Ownership Cost
description: JSON Schema for the VINaudit Vehicle Ownership Cost API response, returning itemized 5-year cost projections for depreciation, insurance, fuel, maintenance, repairs, and fees.

mileage_year.description: Annual mileage estimate used in fuel and maintenance calculations

vehicle.description: Full vehicle description (Year Make Model Trim)

depreciation_cost.description: Yearly depreciation costs (5 values, one per year)

insurance_cost.description: Yearly insurance costs (5 values, one per year)

fuel_cost.description: Yearly fuel costs (5 values, one per year)

maintenance_cost.description: Yearly routine maintenance costs (5 values, one per year)

repairs_cost.description: Yearly repair costs (5 values, one per year)

fees_cost.description: Yearly state fees and taxes (5 values, one per year)

total_cost.description: Yearly total costs (5 values, one per year)

success.description: Whether the ownership cost calculation was successful

error.description: Error message or empty string if successful
